query:
INSERT INTO academy_languages (name, nativeName, slug, category, description, culturalContext, status) VALUES
('Nahuatl', 'Nāhuatl', 'nahuatl', 'indigenous', 'Ancient Aztec language, still spoken by millions in Mexico', 'Language of the Mexica people, carriers of sacred calendar and cosmological knowledge', 'active'),
('Yoruba', 'Èdè Yorùbá', 'yoruba', 'indigenous', 'West African language spoken by over 40 million people', 'Language of Ifá divination, Orisha traditions, and rich oral literature', 'active'),
('Lakota', 'Lakȟótiyapi', 'lakota', 'indigenous', 'Siouan language of the Lakota people of the Great Plains', 'Language of the Seven Council Fires, carriers of sacred pipe ceremonies', 'active'),
('Quechua', 'Runasimi', 'quechua', 'indigenous', 'Language of the Inca Empire, still spoken by 8-10 million', 'Language of Andean cosmology and reciprocity principles (Ayni)', 'active'),
('Hebrew', 'עברית', 'hebrew', 'ancestral_flame', 'Ancient Semitic language, revived as modern Israeli Hebrew', 'Language of Torah, Kabbalah, and ancient Israelite wisdom', 'active'),
('Aramaic', 'ܐܪܡܝܐ', 'aramaic', 'ancestral_flame', 'Ancient language spoken by Jesus and used in Talmud', 'Language of ancient Near East, bridge between Hebrew and Arabic traditions', 'active'),
('Geez', 'ግዕዝ', 'geez', 'ancestral_flame', 'Ancient Ethiopian liturgical language', 'Language of Ethiopian Orthodox Church and ancient Aksumite civilization', 'active'),
('Spanish', 'Español', 'spanish', 'global_trade', 'Second most spoken native language globally', 'Bridge language connecting Americas, Europe, and Africa', 'active'),
('French', 'Français', 'french', 'global_trade', 'Official language in 29 countries across multiple continents', 'Language of diplomacy and African francophone nations', 'active'),
('Swahili', 'Kiswahili', 'swahili', 'global_trade', 'Bantu language spoken by over 100 million across East Africa', 'Trade language uniting East African peoples, language of Pan-African unity', 'active'),
('Mandarin Chinese', '普通话', 'mandarin', 'global_trade', 'Most spoken language in the world by native speakers', 'Language of ancient civilization, philosophy, and global commerce', 'active'),
('English', 'English', 'english', 'global_trade', 'Global lingua franca of commerce and technology', 'Tool for global communication while honoring native tongues', 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
